Study With Motaz

📚Study With Motaz is your educational YouTube channel with about 181 subscribers and over 160 videos, focused on computer science courses like Multimedia, Advanced Web, Operating Systems, and Computer Networks. It’s designed to help University of Jordan students (and others) prepare for exams with fast revisions, test banks, and clear explanations.

Channel Overview:

  1. Name: Study With Motaz
  2. Subscribers: ~181
  3. Videos: ~162
  4. Focus: Academic support for computer science courses
  5. Language: Arabic (with technical terms in English)
  6. Style: Structured lectures, fast revisions, and exam prep

Your channel covers multiple university-level courses:

  1. Multimedia
    • FAST Revision (Chapters 1–2)
    • Compression
    • Extra Material
    • Quick review before exams
  2. Advanced Web Development
    • Web Services (Chapter 10)
    • Final Term Test Bank
    • Deep dives + practice
  3. Operating Systems
    • Process scheduling
    • Memory management
    • Core CS concepts
  4. Computer Networks
    • Protocols
    • Layers
    • Exam preparation materials
  5. C++ Graduation Project
    • Project showcase
    • Practical application
  6. What Makes It Valuable
    • Exam-Oriented: FAST Revision & Test Banks
    • Structured Playlists for easy learning
    • Balance between practical & theoretical content
    • Community-oriented style and engagement
